videoSnippet.title: Good Things Come In Small Packages, But So Does Poison || Vincent vs Aravindh || Prague Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Keymer, Vincent (2776) - Aravindh, Chithambaram VR. (2700)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.02.28
C41 Philidor, Improved Hanham variation

1.e4 d6 2.d4 Nf6 3.Nc3 e5 4.Nf3 Nbd7 5.h3 Be7 6.g4 h6 7.Be3 c6 8.a4 O-O 9.Qd2 d5 10.exd5 e4 11.dxc6 exf3 12.cxd7 Bxd7 13.g5 hxg5 14.Bxg5 Nd5 15.Rg1 Nxc3 16.bxc3 Re8 17.Kd1 Rc8 18.Bxe7 Qxe7 19.Bd3 g6 20.Qh6 Rc6 21.Kd2 Bf5 22.Qg5 Rxc3 23.Qxf5 Rec8 24.Rab1 Qh4 25.Qxf3 Qxd4 26.Ke2 Qxa4 27.Kf1 b6 28.Qd5 Kg7 29.Rg4
